name: Braised Sirloin Tips Over Rice - "a Collection...
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Sirloin or round, sliced into 3-inch strips
2 beef bouillon cubes, dissolved in water
1 cup red wine or cranberry juice
4 cups hot cooked rice or noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Brown beef slices until browned on all sides.
2. Add dissolved bouillon, red wine or cranberry juice, minced garlic, onion, and soy sauce to the pan. Stir well to combine.
3. Bring mixture to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 hour or until meat is tender.
4. Add sliced water chestnuts and Chinese pea pods. Stir in cornstarch slurry (cornstarch mixed with hot water) into the sauce, stirring constantly until it thickens.
5. Continue cooking for 1 minute after the mixture begins to boil. Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
Alternate:
Omit soy sauce, Chinese pea pods, and water chestnuts. Add 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce instead. Serve over noodles.
